reviews.comment:
Lugar tranquilo y limpio como para cargar combustible y ir al baño y tomar unos mates bajo la sombra de la arboleda

(Translated by Google)
A quiet and clean place to refuel, use the restroom, and have some mate under the shade of the trees.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURsM0tXZ1N3EAE

reviews.comment:
Malo, no tienen ni siquiera una gomeria

(Translated by Google)
Bad, they don't even have a tire shop
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURsOEt5RkJnEAE

reviews.comment:
Tiene solo 2 surtidores, si bien se lentifica  en temporada para los que gustan de hacer paradas prolongadas tiene una zona arbolada con mesas y parrillas seguras y limpias para descansar sol o en familia. Punto extra para la limpieza.

(Translated by Google)
It only has two pumps, and while it slows down during peak season, for those who like to make longer stops, there's a wooded area with tables and safe, clean grills for relaxing in the sun or with family. Bonus points for cleanliness.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsdDVDQ253RRAB

reviews.comment:
Lindo espacio exterior.Bosquecito de Pampa y mate.

(Translated by Google)
Lovely outdoor space. Pampas woodland and mate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsMTREaUdnEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
The service was very friendly, and it saved me halfway through the fuel issue.

reviews.comment:
Siempre el ACA es garantía de limpieza en los baños y en la atención de su personal. Un lujo y eso que no soy socio

(Translated by Google)
The ACA is always a guarantee of clean restrooms and excellent service from its staff. A real treat, and I'm not even a member!
